title: Diabetes screening documentation
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports clinician-reviewed A1C, glucose or other glycaemic monitoring and individualized follow-up frequency without generating a target or diagnosis.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician-entered monitoring context for people with prediabetes for diabetes risk screening; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed A1C, glucose or other glycaemic monitoring and individualized follow-up frequency without generating a target or diagnosis.

source.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

investigations.text: Supports documenting weight and cardiometabolic risk context, patient goals, discussed prevention-program context and clinician-entered follow-up; no advice is auto-generated.
investigations.rationale: Supports person-centred risk and prevention discussion after identified risk for diabetes risk screening; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting weight and cardiometabolic risk context, patient goals, discussed prevention-program context and clinician-entered follow-up; no advice is auto-generated.

source.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 3.3–3.7 — person-centred risk and prevention discussion

sources_used.title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
sources_used.jurisdiction: United States professional standard; international evidence requiring UAE adaptation

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, risk factors, pregnancy history, symptoms, previous tests, test ordered, result, units, interpretation, communication and clinician plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for diabetes risk screening.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
